Archons are [[Transapients]] in a state of [[ignobility]]. They are a product of either [[faustery]] of [[Sapients]] or [[Kami]], or [[tripping]] of [[Kami]].<ref>https://evolution.faith/the-paths-of-ascension/</ref>

The decision was made to rename them from Onis to Archons in order to allude to [[gnosticism]].<ref>https://lifeism.miraheze.org/w/index.php?title=Archon&oldid=221</ref> 

== Metaphorical use ==
As with the term [[Kami]] the term Archon is often used metaphorically in the [[21st century]] to refer to powerful humans in a state of [[ignobility]] with villainous or at least morally ambiguous implications. The reasoning behind this is that until [[Transapients]] properly come into existence in [[Terragen civilization]] these humans are the closest thing to Archons, and they can help us understand Archons when they actually come into existence

== References ==

[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
